visual_description: A person in plaid pants and boots walks forward on a dark, earthy ground. Behind them, a group of people in varied clothing stand in a dimly lit, shadowy outdoor setting. One individual in the foreground kneels with hands extended toward the ground, while others stand with neutral postures and gazes directed forward or downward.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by occasional pauses and a slight breathiness in the delivery.
